productDisplayName: Spalding Men's Running White Green Shoe
description: With sleek styling and a comfortable design, these shoes come packed with performance features to help you up your game. Team this with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.  Upper Synthetic leather with fibre casing for heavy structuring and support while running Central lacing with mesh tongue for comfort and breathability Glossy stitched structure outside the heel cup along with padded collar for added cushioning Stitched detailing to further add to the structure Rubber outsole extended to the toe box and attached to it Midsole Soft, cushioned midsole for all day step in comfort Full length phylon midsole for lightweight durability Removable sockliner to replace with an orthotic Outsole Trusstic unit extended to the sides for complete inner arch support Multi directional structures on the outsole for great grip Scooped heel cup for added air cushioning below the heel Impact guidance system for natural motion of the feet shoe careKeep your shoes away from the sunRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
